exam_name: Elastic Certified Beats and Logstash Administrator (ECBA)
exam_format: Hands-on practical (live Elasticsearch environment, remote proctored)

testing_centers.notes: Hands-on practical exams. Remote proctored — performed in a live Elasticsearch cluster environment.

exam_rules: Hands-on practical exam — performed in a live Elasticsearch environment. Open documentation (elastic.co docs only allowed). No other resources. Remote proctored.
renewal_options: Certifications valid for 3 years. Renew by retaking the exam.

prerequisites.description: Experience with Beats and Logstash pipeline configuration

retake_policy.notes: Retake fee is $400. No waiting period specified.

official_study_resources.title: Elastic Training
official_study_resources.notes: Official Elastic training courses aligned to certification exams

aliases: elastic certified beats and logstash administrator
elastic certified beats and logstash administrator ecba
